info.name: Ceroc DJ Request Engine
info.description: Live event and track request system for Ceroc dance events.

list.name: list_ceroc_events
list.description: Returns a list of upcoming Ceroc dance events where requests are being accepted.

list.name: search_ceroc_tracks
list.description: Searches the DJ's music library for a specific track to see if it is available for request.

query.description: The name of the artist or track to search for.
